title: Cognitive Firewalls Capstone Defense
public_claim: A public defense room for the qualitative Cognitive Firewalls capstone.
distinctive_mechanism: It explains the research question, corrupted-evidence scenario design, SAT execution, coding logic, reviewer checks, claim boundaries, and post-defense state.
use_value: It gives a reviewer a single place to understand what was submitted, what was found, and what should not be overclaimed.
